Name: Adidas Pharrell Williams Hu Nmd Noble Ink
Description: The NMD Noble Ink uses a multicolour primeknit upper that promises comfort and ease. The upper features the words “Body” and “Earth” on each foot embroidered in white. The pair is completed with a yellow collar and lace cage providing perfect contrast and character to the runner.

Description: N/A

Name: Adidas Nite Jogger White
Description: The all White Nite Jogger features a full length boost midsole with an ortholite liner. reflective panels and accents does justice to the nite jogger name making it perfect for nighttime visibility. Paying perfect homage to the iconic sneaker from the 70s with modern materials and a futuristic design. the full boost midsole makes for an extremely comfortable running sneakers

Name: Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Mono Mist
Description: Letting go of the primeknit upper everyone has grown to love in the 350 silhouette, the new Yeezy 350 v2 Mono Mist features a once piece upper crafted from a mesh like mono filament, with a brown colour palette and translucent side stripe. The Mono Mist is a blood new take on a silhouette that has never failed

Name: Adidas x Bad Bunny Forum Low Core Black
Description: N/A

Name: Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Mono Ice
Description: The adidas Yeezy 350 V2 Mono Ice is one of three from the Mono pack. Each sneaker’s upper is constructed from a new monofilament mesh in Ice blue that exposes the model’s inner cage lining. The Mono pack brings back the heel’s pull tab design on each pair. To finish it out, a familiar Boost sole is added for comfort for the wearer.

Name: Adidas Yeezy 450 Dark Slate
Description: The Adidas Yeezy 450 Dark Slate features a simplified two-piece construction with a dark Slate foam sole that clasps a black sock-like Primeknit upper. Thick laces and a wrap around sole complete the monochromatic yet bold sneaker

Name: Adidas Yeezy 700 v3 Alvah
Description: The Adidas Yeezy 700 V3 Alvah is the perfect example of how an all black color scheme can make even the boldest silhouette look classy. Featuring a black and grey upper with a glow in the dark RPU cage for structure and durability. 3M reflective detailing on the toe and an EVA midsole and outsole complete the pair.

Name: Adidas Yeezy 700 V3 Azael
Description: The third incarnation of the Yeezy 700 is one of the most sophisticated designs to date with an RPU cage that glows in the dark and an ortholite sockliner. The sneaker also features 3M reflective details on the toe. The bulky outsole completes the pair with a semi exposed boost outsole that provides the comfort that the brand is known for

Name: Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Beluga (Reflective)
Description: One of Yeezy’s most celebrated designs received a reflective makeover with the adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Beluga Reflective. Building off of the original Beluga colorway by adding reflective qualities and speckled orange accents to its Primeknit upper, the 2021 iteration features signature details like a Boost sole and orange side stripe that complete the design.

Name: Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Light
Description: The Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Light arrives in what appears to be a clean triple white color palette, but when exposed to UV light, the white Primeknit upper changes colours to a light pink and its mesh side stripe to dark yellow. An off-white Boost sole and canvas heel tab add the finishing touches.

Name: Adidas Yeezy 380 Mist
Description: The 380 Mist features a Mist Primeknit pattern on its upper and lacks the traditional lateral side stripe. An upgraded translucent Boost midsole and engineered gum outsole grip complete the design. The 380 Mist was originally supposed to debut as a 350 v3. These sneakers released in March of 2020  as a whole different silhouette; the 380’s

Name: Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 MX Oat
Categories: Bae Section, REPBULIC DAY SALE, Sneakers, Yeezy
Description: The Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 MX Oat features a yellow, orange, and blue swirl-patterned Primeknit upper much like the other pairs in the MX pack, with a mesh side stripe and yellow heel tab. From there, a semi-translucent Boost midsole and pale yellow rope laces complete the design of the recently

Name: Adidas Yeezy 700 MNVN Bright Cyan
Description: The adidas Yeezy Boost 700 MNVN Bright Cyan features a nylon upper with reflective “700” graphic on the lateral side along with other reflective details on the upper. The Bright Cyan upper adds a bright dash of colour to the yeezy palette. The chunky 700 silhouette and black midsole complete the look of this sneaker

Name: Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Carbon
Description: The black and grey primeknit upper of the Yeezy 350 v2 Carbon makes for the perfect sneaker in the yeezy lineup. With a contrasting gum sole and infinity lacing. The Carbons feature all the iconic traits of a 350, boost sole, lateral side stripe and its legendary silhouette. However, this pair forgoes the heel tab found in most 350s, resulting in a cleaner more sculpted look

Name: Adidas Yeezy 500 Clay Brown
Description: The Adidas Yeezy 500 Clay Brown presents an array of materials commonly found in hiking shoes designed to withstand the great outdoors. Constructed of a Clay Brown mesh upper with leather and suede overlays that wrap around the silhouette. A sturdy adiPRENE sole adds a responsive feel to the trail-ready chunky design

Name: Adidas Yeezy Slide Resin
Description: The Adidas Yeezy Slide Resin is made of a full EVA foam unit providing lightweight durability. A neutral ‘Resin’ green colour tone complements the laid back design of the slide. A soft footbed and an outsole with grooves for traction complete the design

Name: Adidas Yeezy Foam Runner Sand
Description: The adidas Yeezy Foam RNNR Sand arrives in a Sand monochromatic color scheme, much like its predecessor. Its one-piece sculpted upper with oval cut-outs provide a futuristic aesthetic to complete the bold design aesthetic.

Description: The Adidas Yeezy Foam RNNR Mineral Blue is made of a Mineral Blue foam that blends EVA with harvested algae. Oval cut-outs throughout the upper add ventilation to finish off the design. The dark blue colour palette adds class to an otherwise bold silhouette

Name: Adidas Yeezy Soot Slide
